Uses of Package
agilitycompetition

  • Classes in agilitycompetition used by agilitycompetition 
    Class and Description
    Competitor
    Course: CSCI 160
    Project: AgilityCompetition (Version 2 Solution)
    File: Contest.java
    Uses: Date, ElapsedTime
    Extends: Pet
    Overrides: Comparable <Dog>
    A class to model a competitor with an elapsed time on the course.
    Date
    The Date Class represents a date as 3 int values for month, day, and year.
    Dog
    Course: CSCI 160
    Project: AgilityCompetition (Version 2 Solution)
    File: Dog.java
    Uses: Date class
    Extends: nothing
    Implements: Comparable
    Presumption: All dogs have these attributes
    A class to represent a Dog
    ElapsedTime
    Course: CSCI 160
    File: ElapsedTime.java
    Uses: nothing
    Extends: nothing
    Implements: Comparable
    Pet
    Course: CSCI 160
    Project: AgilityCompetition (Version 2 Solution)
    File: Pet.java
    Uses: Date class
    Extends: Dog
    Overrides: Comparable <Dog>
    A class to model a pet dog which adds a name for the dog and an
    owner name to the properties of Dog.
